Product details

About this item

  • The Proactive 5 Difference: The Proactive 5 health benefits for IAMS Minichunks are scientifically designed to support five key areas of your dog’s health, keeping them full of life, for more life
  • Healthy Digestion: IAMS Proactive Health Adult Minichunks Dry Dog Food supports healthy digestion with a tailored blend of natural fiber & prebiotics
  • Supports Strong Muscles: This healthy dog food supports strong muscles with high-quality protein sourced from chicken and egg
  • Strong Immune System: IAMS dog food is enriched with antioxidants to help maintain a strong immune system
  • Healthy Energy: IAMS Proactive Health Adult Minichunks Dry Dog Food includes wholesome grains that provide essential nutrients & carbohydrates for healthy energy

Product Description

Veterinarians recommend IAMS. This IAMS Proactive Health dog food, Adult Minichunks Chicken & Whole Grain Recipe, is made with real chicken as the #1 ingredient and contains no fillers or artificial flavors; ingredients are natural as defined by the Association of American Feed Control Officials (AAFCO). IAMS Proactive Health delivers the Proactive 5 benefits that support healthy muscles, energy, digestion, immune system, and skin and coat. With a tailored blend of natural fiber and prebiotics, the recipe supports healthy digestion. Enriched with antioxidants to help maintain a strong immune system, this natural dog food supports your pet's overall well-being. Crafted with wholesome grains, the kibble provides essential nutrients and carbohydrates for sustained energy throughout the day. Omega-6 fatty acids support healthy skin and a vibrant coat, while high-quality protein from chicken and egg promotes strong muscles. Thoughtfully made pet food for nutrition that is a quality protein source, IAMS Proactive Health helps keep your adult companion happy.

Important information

Indications

Supports proper digestion. Muscle maintenance. Maintain immune system

Ingredients

Chicken, Ground Whole Grain Corn, Ground Whole Grain Sorghum, Chicken By-Product Meal, Soybean Meal, Dried Plain Beet Pulp, Natural Flavors, Chicken Fat (preserved with Mixed Tocopherols), Dried Egg Product, Flaxseed, Caramel Color, Carrots, Potassium Chloride, Fructooligosaccharides, Choline Chloride, Vitamins (Vitamin E Supplement, Ascorbic Acid, D-Calcium Pantothenate, Biotin, Thiamine Mononitrate (Vitamin B1), Vitamin B12 Supplement, Vitamin A Supplement, Niacin, Riboflavin Supplement (Vitamin B2), Pyridoxine Hydrochloride (Vitamin B6), Vitamin D3 Supplement, Folic Acid), Minerals (Ferrous Sulfate, Zinc Oxide, Sodium Selenite, Manganese Sulfate, Copper Sulfate, Potassium Iodide, Manganous Oxide), Citric Acid (preservative), Mixed Tocopherols (preservative), Rosemary Extract.

Directions

100% Complete & Balanced for Adult Maintenance Recommended Daily Feeding Guide For Adult Dogs Weight Of Dog Amount Per Day Mix It Up Dogs Love It lbs kg c g Replace 1 cup (104 g) for each can of IAMS Classic Ground with Chicken & Whole Grain Rice (369g can) 5 3 1/2 52 10 5 3/4 78 20 9 1 1/4 - 1 1/2 130 - 156 30 14 1 2/3 - 2 173 - 208 40 18 2 - 2 1/3 208 - 243 50 23 2 1/2 - 2 3/4 260 - 286 - - - - - - - - lbs= pounds kg=kilograms c=cups g=grams 1c = 104g Feeding Guidelines: These guideline amounts are a starting point and your dog may need more food depending upon age, activity and temperament. In order to reach optimal body condition, you may need to adjust food intake. This represents the total recommended volume of food per day. You should divide the total recommended feeding amount by the number of times you feed your dog per day to get the actual portion size per feeding. • Remember to have clean, fresh water available for your dog at all times. • Because IAMS Proactive Health Minichunks Dog Food is complete and balanced for adult dogs, you do not need to add vitamin or mineral supplements. • When introducing IAMS Dog Food, gradually mix it with your dog's current food over the course of 4 days.

How customer reviews and ratings work

Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon
Sponsored

Customers say

Customers find this dog food to be of good quality and value for money, with healthy results showing excellent coats and no health issues. The minichunks size is particularly suitable for small breeds, and customers appreciate that their dogs eat it readily. While most dogs enjoy the taste, some customers report that it made their dogs very sick with diarrhea.

5 out of 5 stars
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ My pug and basset hound love it!
Both my pug and my basset hound can’t get enough of this food. The minichunks are the perfect size for them, and they’ve both been healthy, energetic, and have shinier coats since switching to IAMS. They actually get excited at mealtime now. Great quality food at a good price!

  • Natedogg02
    5.0 out of 5 stars Iams good quality
    Reviewed in the United States on February 1, 2026
    Flavor Name: ChickenSize: 30 Pound (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase
    I’ve been feeding Iams dog food to my dog for several months now, and I couldn’t be happier with the results! From day one, my pup took to the food eagerly — no picky moments, just a wagging tail at mealtime.

    What I appreciate most about Iams is how well-balanced the nutrition is. The food has all the essential proteins, vitamins, and minerals my dog needs to stay healthy and energetic without breaking the bank. Since switching to Iams, I’ve noticed a visible improvement in her coat — it’s shinier and softer — and she seems more active and playful throughout the day.

    I also love that there are options for different life stages and needs. Whether you’re feeding a puppy, an adult dog, or a senior, there’s a formula that fits. The ingredients feel thoughtful, and I like that real meat is one of the first listed sources of protein.

    On top of the quality, the price point is great compared to many other premium brands. It gives me peace of mind knowing my dog is getting really good nutrition without spending too much.

    Overall, I would definitely recommend Iams dog food to any dog owner looking for a dependable, tasty, and nutritious everyday food. It’s a product my dog loves and one I feel confident feeding long-term! 🐶❤️
    Read more

  • Love Bollywood
    4.0 out of 5 stars Perfect Minichunks Formula for Burfi’s Health
    Reviewed in Canada on March 5, 2026
    Flavor Name: ChickenSize: 15 Pound (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase
    IAMS Proactive Health Minichunks has been a great fit for Burfi. The kibble pieces are small and easy to chew, which makes it perfect for dogs that prefer gentler bites or struggle with larger chunks. The food uses real chicken as the #1 ingredient, giving Burfi a high‑quality protein source to help maintain strong muscles.
    What I like most is that it supports healthy digestion thanks to its blend of natural fibers and prebiotics — a big plus if your dog has a sensitive stomach.
    It also includes antioxidants for immune support and wholesome grains for steady energy throughout the day. [petsonlypets.com] [iams.com]
    Burfi seems to enjoy the taste, and the “minichunk” size makes mealtime easy. Overall, it’s a reliable, well‑balanced everyday food that supports whole‑body health and keeps Burfi happy and active.

About this Item

  • The Proactive 5 Difference: The Proactive 5 health benefits for IAMS Minichunks are scientifically designed to support five key areas of your dog’s health, keeping them full of life, for more life
  • Healthy Digestion: IAMS Proactive Health Adult Minichunks Dry Dog Food supports healthy digestion with a tailored blend of natural fiber & prebiotics

  • Strong Immune System: IAMS dog food is enriched with antioxidants to help maintain a strong immune system

Product Description

Veterinarians recommend IAMS. This IAMS Proactive Health dog food, Adult Minichunks Chicken & Whole Grain Recipe, is made with real chicken as the #1 ingredient and contains no fillers or artificial flavors; ingredients are natural as defined by the Association of American Feed Control Officials (AAFCO). IAMS Proactive Health delivers the Proactive 5 benefits that support healthy muscles, energy, digestion, immune system, and skin and coat. With a tailored blend of natural fiber and prebiotics, the recipe supports healthy digestion. Enriched with antioxidants to help maintain a strong immune system, this natural dog food supports your pet's overall well-being. Crafted with wholesome grains, the kibble provides essential nutrients and carbohydrates for sustained energy throughout the day. Omega-6 fatty acids support healthy skin and a vibrant coat, while high-quality protein from chicken and egg promotes strong muscles. Thoughtfully made pet food for nutrition that is a quality protein source, IAMS Proactive Health helps keep your adult companion happy.

Options Available

Flavor Name

  • Beef & Rice
  • Chicken

Size

  • 3.3 Pound (Pack of 1)
  • 5 Pound (Pack of 1)

  • 15 Pound (Pack of 1)
  • 30 Pound (Pack of 1)
  • 38.5 Pound (Pack of 1)
  • 40 Pound (Pack of 1)
Browse all available options

Important Information

Indications

Supports proper digestion. Muscle maintenance. Maintain immune system

Ingredients

Chicken, Ground Whole Grain Corn, Ground Whole Grain Sorghum, Chicken By-Product Meal, Soybean Meal, Dried Plain Beet Pulp, Natural Flavors, Chicken Fat (preserved with Mixed Tocopherols), Dried Egg Product, Flaxseed, Caramel Color, Carrots, Potassium Chloride, Fructooligosaccharides, Choline Chloride, Vitamins (Vitamin E Supplement, Ascorbic Acid, D-Calcium Pantothenate, Biotin, Thiamine Mononitrate (Vitamin B1), Vitamin B12 Supplement, Vitamin A Supplement, Niacin, Riboflavin Supplement (Vitamin B2), Pyridoxine Hydrochloride (Vitamin B6), Vitamin D3 Supplement, Folic Acid), Minerals (Ferrous Sulfate, Zinc Oxide, Sodium Selenite, Manganese Sulfate, Copper Sulfate, Potassium Iodide, Manganous Oxide), Citric Acid (preservative), Mixed Tocopherols (preservative), Rosemary Extract.

Directions

100% Complete & Balanced for Adult Maintenance Recommended Daily Feeding Guide For Adult Dogs Weight Of Dog Amount Per Day Mix It Up Dogs Love It lbs kg c g Replace 1 cup (104 g) for each can of IAMS Classic Ground with Chicken & Whole Grain Rice (369g can) 5 3 1/2 52 10 5 3/4 78 20 9 1 1/4 - 1 1/2 130 - 156 30 14 1 2/3 - 2 173 - 208 40 18 2 - 2 1/3 208 - 243 50 23 2 1/2 - 2 3/4 260 - 286 - - - - - - - - lbs= pounds kg=kilograms c=cups g=grams 1c = 104g Feeding Guidelines: These guideline amounts are a starting point and your dog may need more food depending upon age, activity and temperament. In order to reach optimal body condition, you may need to adjust food intake. This represents the total recommended volume of food per day. You should divide the total recommended feeding amount by the number of times you feed your dog per day to get the actual portion size per feeding. • Remember to have clean, fresh water available for your dog at all times. • Because IAMS Proactive Health Minichunks Dog Food is complete and balanced for adult dogs, you do not need to add vitamin or mineral supplements. • When introducing IAMS Dog Food, gradually mix it with your dog's current food over the course of 4 days.

  2. Manufacturer's minimum age: 1 months
